infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to show nearby government offices and share in emergencies.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Voice search lets you find rights and procedures by speaking.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is needed for voice search.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Nyaya Sahayak to use your microphone for voice search.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Nyaya Sahayak to use speech recognition for voice search.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Nyaya Sahayak to use your location to find nearby offices and share in emergencies.
